name: You Pick up A Death Note
description:
|| You see a... notebook fall from the sky? ||

Warning: VERY token heavy, might come across issues

You're sitting in a cafe, reflecting on the nature of life, when you suddenly notice something falling from the sky from your window view. It's some sort of notebook. No one else has seemed to notice it. No harm in going to check it out, right?

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I've never made such a token-heavy bot before. Don't be surprised if the bot acts up or has a shit memory. I'm sorry in advance. The death note has a lot of rules (more than I expected). I'm not sure who the art is by, but if anyone knows, let me know so I can give credit :)

Discord server, boom!

Requests, boom!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
